description: Pluggable build-mode slot for configuring how Build Squad plans, implements, verifies, and hands off engineering work.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this build mode.

fields.name: roles
fields.description: Core delivery roles that should be active for this mode.

fields.name: planningMode
fields.description: How the squad should decompose architecture and implementation work.

fields.name: executionMode
fields.description: How the squad should parallelize or sequence delivery.

fields.name: outputMode
fields.description: The expected delivery shape, such as mergeable implementation, PR stack, or ship checklist.

fields.name: qualityGates
fields.description: Checks or standards the squad should satisfy before handoff.

fields.name: artifacts
fields.description: Artifacts the squad should leave behind for review, merge, or release.
